title: Minehard
description: Minecraft is too easy, so I made it harder.
body:
## Features
- Mobs may be buffed, have special attacks or characteristics
- New game mechanics
- Harder end dragon fight
## Info
- **Works in multiplayer**
- **No texture pack required**
<details>
<summary>End fight</summary>

1. Every once in a while a **death ray** gets shot from the sky, dealing damage to anyone nearby
2. Arrows can't be shot into crystals
3. Looking at crystals damages you (bypasses armor)

</details>


<details>
<summary>New game mechanics</summary>

1. You can randomly get **blindness**, **weakness** or **slowness** when taking damage unless you are wearing full armor
2. You **burn in the nether** if you equip **every armor slot** with any material armor (equipping 3 slots won't burn you)
3. Fall damage is **1.2x** when wearing armor
4. Wearing armor in water makes you **sink faster**.


</details>

<details>
<summary>Mobs</summary>

<details>
  <summary>New mobs</summary>

<details>
<summary>Moss tower</summary>
The moss tower will spawn alongside zombies, it will attack the player by casting a moss beam. The only way to kill the moss tower is to destroy the block below it.
  
</details>
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mob buffs</summary>

1. Zombies are stronger
2. Creepers get instantly charged in thunderstorms
3. Creepers' explosions radius now can vary
4. Every vex spawns in group of 4
5. Witches spawn with an illusioner

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mob special attacks</summary>

1. Skeletons' arrows summon a lightning bolt wherever they hit
2. Pillagers' arrows summon a rain of arrows wherever they hit
3. Phantoms drop a damage potion every 4 seconds
4. Blazes will make it rain fire after they get hit for the first time

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mob special characteristics</summary>

1. Zombies are faster at night if they can see the sky
2. Zombies are immune to the sun
3. Villagers now vary in size, some of them may not fit through doors
4. Creepers are silent
5. Every bunny is a killer bunny
6. Looking at vindicators scares you, so you can't move while looking at them
7. Creepers explode instantly if falling from a 5 block height or more and take damage
8. Endermen are 2 blocks tall
9. Zombie piglins are always mad at the player unless they wear any piece of diamond armor
10. Spiders are disguised as grass blocks
11. Hitting pigs (unless they are 1-shotted) may cause them to become zombie piglins
12. Piglin brutes will copy your weapon if you kill one of them in a 10 block radius


</details>

</details>

## Links
- [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Zq6pN2ePpv)
- [Discord user](http://discord.com/users/693430723788406877)

## Future plans

No particular plans for now, feel free to suggest anything in my discord server.
